videoSnippet.title: "One of the Very Greatest Masters" || Akiba Rubinstein vs Dawid Janowski || San Sebastian (1911)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Akiba Rubinstein vs David Janowski
San Sebastian (1911), San Sebastian ESP, rd 7, Mar-02
Indian Game: East Indian Defense (E00)

1. c4 Nf6 2. d4 e6 3. Nc3 Be7 4. Nf3 O-O 5. Bg5 b6 6. e3 Bb7 7. Bd3 d6 8. Qe2 c5 9. Rd1 Nc6 10. O-O Nd7 11. Bf4 a6 12. Bb1 Qc7 13. d5 Nd8 14. Qd3 g6 15. de6 Ne5 16. Be5 de5 17. Qd7 Ne6 18. Qc7 Nc7 19. Rd7 Bd8 20. Ne5 Bc8 21. Rd6 Be6 22. Be4 Rc8 23. Bb7 Rb8 24. Nc6 Rb7 25. Nd8 Rb8 26. Nc6 Rbe8 27. Nd5 Bd5 28. cd5 f6 29. Rd1 Rf7 30. Kf1 Kg7 31. Ke2 Nb5 32. Re6 Nc7 33. Re8 Ne8 34. e4 Nd6 35. Kd3 g5 36. f3 Rd7 37. g3 Nb5 38. a4 Nd6 39. f4 gf4 40. gf4 f5 41. e5 Ne4 42. Ke3 b5 43. ab5 ab5 44. Rg1 Kf8 45. Rd1
